name: Sloppy Louie's Catfish Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 Blended frying oil or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1/8 inch oil in a skillet until very hot.
2. Lightly dust the catfish fillets with flour.
3. Dip the fillets in beaten egg.
4. Fry the fish about 1 minute on each side, just until it turns pale gold.
5. Remove the pan from heat and add butter and remaining ingredients except garnish.
6. Saute the fish for three more minutes per side, basting with pan juices.
7. Transfer the fish to a heated platter and garnish with parsley on half a lemon slice and paprika as an alternative.
